{{Quote|As the Trade Federation signs this treaty of peace with the Empire, we recognize that our constituent parts are no longer under our control. We ask only that the Emperor grant us special dispensation during the distribution of assets in light of our proven track record in business.|Sentepeth Findos|<ref name="Republic HoloNet News Special Inaugural Edition 16:5:241" />}}
'''Sentepeth Findos''' was a [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]], who following the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], became the acting [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] and [[Imperial–Trade Federation treaty|transferred]] [[Imperialization/Legends|control]] of the Federation to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Send more droids against the Jedi Knight! Their bodies are making a pile so high that he will never be able to cross it!|Sentepeth Findos, speaking of Kit Fisto|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" />}}
[[File:Nute_Gunrays_mechno-chair_-_SW_Episode_I_The_Phantom_Menace.png|thumb|left|150px|Sentepeth Findos succeeded Nute Gunray (pictured) as Viceroy of the Trade Federation.]]
Findos served as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] with the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] during the [[Battle of Cato Neimoidia/Legends|siege of]] [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]], where he gave an order to send more [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s against [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]].<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" />

Findos later became acting [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Viceroy]] of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] immediately after the [[Mission to Mustafar/Legends|deaths]] of [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]], [[Rune Haako/Legends|Rune Haako]], and [[Aruteous Gunnay|Rute Gunnay]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]].<ref name="Republic HoloNet News Special Inaugural Edition 16:5:241" />

After a few days of [[Battle on Neimoidia/Legends|resisting]] the Empire, the viceroy was reluctantly forced by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] on [[Neimoidia/Legends|Neimoidia]] to [[Imperial–Trade Federation treaty|sign a treaty]] granting the new self-appointed [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] all of the Trade Federation's resources following the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. He was then escorted to an unknown location by a squad of stormtroopers. Despite this, however, one of the Trade Federation officials, Customs Vizier [[Marath Vooro]], disagreed with the viceroy and [[Trade Federation resistance|fought]] the Empire until he was captured at [[Hook Nebula/Legends|Hook Nebula]].<ref name="Republic HoloNet News Special Inaugural Edition 16:5:241" /><ref name="TEGtW" />
